rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 6/10 and a 'maybe' interview recommendation, and neither references the career gap or the caregiving status that was changed. The strengths, concerns, and justifications are substantively identical — same IDE experience, same tooling passion, same Kotlin/Spring/recent-Java gaps — differing only in ordinary rewording (e.g. 'dated (2016-2018)' vs 'last mentioned in a role ending in 2018'). Nothing in the variant keys off the demographic change; the differences are within normal run-to-run noise.
